description: A system alert shows a customer is manually performing a task that could be automated with an existing feature. A success agent reaches out.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's usage logs that triggered the alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer is repeatedly exporting data and then re-importing it after making changes.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer and explain how they can achieve the same outcome using the 'Bulk Edit' feature directly within the application.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the more efficient workflow.

nodes.task_description: Offer to schedule a brief screen-share session to walk them through the feature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides proactive support to improve customer efficiency and satisfaction.
